PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeremy Burns for and with (petitioner) Gillian Baze.

Mr. Burns reported that the death certificate lists Mr. Larsen's address as 1000 Green St. in San Francisco and confirmed that the decedent lived in San Francisco even though he died in Alameda County. The Court stated that it will allow venue to be San Francisco and granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
